use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation headers and sidebars
Showing avatar placeholders in comment sections and discussion threads
Representing users in dashboard user listings and admin panels
User identification in card components and list views
Profile image display in settings and account management pages
ai_summary: A lightweight Avatar component using base-ui primitives for displaying user profile images with automatic fallback support. The component exports Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback subcomponents with full Tailwind styling flexibility. Designed as a foundational atomic component suitable for composing into navigation bars, user cards, comment systems, and profile sections across any application requiring user representation.
